name: rollback-workflow
description: Emergency rollback procedure. Halt current rollout, identify previous stable version, rollback to that version, and verify success.

steps.name: check_current_status
steps.description: Check current production track status and identify in-progress releases

steps.name: get_release_history
steps.description: Get detailed release history to identify previous stable version

steps.name: analyze_release_strategy
steps.description: Analyze release strategy to get rollback recommendation

steps.name: determine_rollback_target
steps.description: Determine target version for rollback based on history and strategy
steps.command: echo 'Analyzing rollback target...' && if [ -n '${env.ROLLBACK_VERSION}' ]; then echo 'Using specified rollback version: ${env.ROLLBACK_VERSION}'; else echo 'Will use previous stable version from history'; fi

steps.name: check_vitals_before_rollback
steps.description: Check current vitals before performing rollback for documentation

steps.name: check_anrs_before_rollback
steps.description: Check current ANR rates before rollback for documentation

steps.name: confirm_rollback_action
steps.description: Require confirmation before proceeding with rollback
steps.command: if [ '${env.CONFIRM_ROLLBACK}' != 'true' ]; then echo 'CONFIRM_ROLLBACK is not true. Skipping rollback.' && exit 1; else echo 'Proceeding with rollback...'; fi

steps.name: execute_rollback
steps.description: Perform rollback to previous stable version

steps.name: verify_rollback_completed
steps.description: Verify that rollback has been applied

steps.name: check_rollback_health
steps.description: Monitor for 10 minutes to ensure rollback is stable

steps.name: generate_rollback_report
steps.description: Generate rollback report for incident documentation
steps.command:
cat > rollback-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).txt << 'EOF'
ROLLBACK INCIDENT REPORT
========================

Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
Package: ${env.PACKAGE}
Track: ${env.TRACK}

Actions Taken:
1. Halted in-progress rollout
2. Analyzed release history and strategy
3. Performed rollback to previous stable version
4. Verified rollback status

Status: COMPLETED

Next Steps:
- Monitor app vitals closely
- Investigate cause of degradation
- Plan fix and re-release when ready
EOF

steps.name: notify_team_rollback_complete
steps.command: echo '========================================' && echo 'ROLLBACK COMPLETED' && echo '========================================' && echo 'Package: ${env.PACKAGE}' && echo 'Track: ${env.TRACK}' && echo 'Time: $(date)' && echo '========================================' && echo 'Rollback has been successfully completed.' && echo 'Previous stable version is now live.' && echo '========================================'

steps.name: create_incident_ticket
steps.command: if [ '${env.CREATE_INCIDENT}' = 'true' ]; then echo 'Incident created for rollback event'; echo 'Contact: ${env.EMERGENCY_CONTACT}'; echo 'Severity: HIGH'; fi

steps.name: final_rollback_verification
steps.command: echo '' && echo 'Rollback Workflow Summary:' && echo '========================' && echo 'Current Track Status:' && gpd publish status --package ${env.PACKAGE} --track ${env.TRACK} 2>/dev/null || echo 'Status check completed' && echo '' && echo 'Rollback completed successfully. Monitor vitals and investigate root cause.'
